# PHASE 8 — Scope

## In Scope
- Unified business command center
- Module navigation across Phases 1–7
- Business blueprint map
- Product status page
- Operational command center (read-only KPIs)
- Role-based demo navigation (no permission change)
- RTL UI consistent with Soft Run M31–M37

## Out of Scope
- New login / customer portal / staff portal
- SaaS / tenant activation
- Auth or permission model changes
- Phase 9 analytics dashboard
- Phase 10 commercial demo
- API / external dependencies
- Full rewrite of existing phase pages
